mapper.sql: id, name_cn, name_en, description_cn, description_en, icon_file_id, connector_type, status, create_time, last_update_time, create_by, last_update_by
mapper.update: UPDATE openplatform_v2_cp_connector_t SET name_cn = #{nameCn}, name_en = #{nameEn}, description_cn = #{descriptionCn}, description_en = #{descriptionEn}, icon_file_id = #{iconFileId}, connector_type = #{connectorType}, status = #{status}, last_update_time = #{lastUpdateTime}, last_update_by = #{lastUpdateBy} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM openplatform_v2_cp_flow_version_t fv WHERE fv.orchestration_config LIKE CONCAT('%', #{connectorId}, '%')
